base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of area_jova_village — a tile (level_layout) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Jova Village — Simon's starting town. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Jova Village — Simon's starting town; day/night variant at 8533
